Amplify ETFs Declares October Income Distributions for its ETFs
Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify Cash Flow Dividend Leaders ETF (COWS)

holdings.infoBox: COWS is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dell Technologies stock at 6.88%, TD SYNNEX at 4.54%, QUALCOMM at 3.92%, Delta Air Lines at 3.59%, and Reliance at 3.45%.

overview.description: The Amplify Cash Flow Dividend Leaders ETF (COWS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Kelly US Cash Flow Dividend Leaders index. The fund is passively managed to invest on US companies with high free cash flow yield and dividend growth. Holdings are weighted based on a modified equal-weight basis COWS was launched on Sep 13, 2023 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
infoTable: Kelly US Cash Flow Dividend Leaders Index
